scripts.setup: npm run certs:generate && docker compose up -d --build && npm run bootstrap
scripts.bootstrap: docker compose exec -T fpm sh -c 'npm install && composer install && npm run build && bash /app/docker/build-wordpress.sh' && npm run wp:install && docker compose exec -T fpm-test bash /app/docker/setup-test-wordpress.sh && npm run test:reset && docker compose --profile playwright run --rm -T playwright npm install
scripts.wp:debug: docker compose exec -e XDEBUG_MODE=debug fpm php -d xdebug.start_with_request=yes /usr/local/bin/wp
scripts.wp:install: docker compose exec fpm bash -c 'wp core install --title="WordPress Museum" --admin_user=admin --admin_password=admin --admin_email=admin@example.com --skip-email --url="${WP_HOME:-http://localhost:8080}"'
scripts.mysql: docker compose exec database mysql -u wordpress -pwordpress wordpress
scripts.mysql:test: docker compose exec fpm-test-db mysql -u wptest -pwptest wptest
scripts.phpunit:debug: docker compose exec -e XDEBUG_MODE=debug fpm-test php -d xdebug.start_with_request=yes /app/vendor/bin/phpunit
scripts.test: docker compose exec fpm-test bash -c '/app/docker/reset-test-wordpress.sh && phpunit'
scripts.test:e2e:ui: docker compose --profile playwright run --rm playwright npx playwright test --ui
scripts.test:e2e:debug: docker compose --profile playwright run --rm playwright npx playwright test --debug
scripts.test:e2e:headed: docker compose --profile playwright run --rm playwright npx playwright test --headed
scripts.composer:install: docker compose exec fpm composer install
scripts.lint: docker compose exec fpm composer run-script lint
scripts.lint:fix: docker compose exec fpm composer run-script lint:fix
scripts.format: docker compose exec fpm composer run-script format
